hooks.command: cmd_prefix="${user_config.cmd_prefix}" summarize_model="${user_config.summarize_model}" summarize_timeout="${user_config.summarize_timeout}" icon="${user_config.icon}" action_app="${user_config.action_app}" alerter_timeout="${user_config.alerter_timeout}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/notify.sh" --title 'Claude needs permission' --message 'Requesting tool access' --sound 'Funk' --context_aware false

cmd_prefix="${user_config.cmd_prefix}" summarize_model="${user_config.summarize_model}" summarize_timeout="${user_config.summarize_timeout}" icon="${user_config.icon}" action_app="${user_config.action_app}" alerter_timeout="${user_config.alerter_timeout}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/notify.sh" --title 'Claude error' --message 'Turn ended with API error' --sound 'Basso' --context_aware false

cmd_prefix="${user_config.cmd_prefix}" summarize_model="${user_config.summarize_model}" summarize_timeout="${user_config.summarize_timeout}" icon="${user_config.icon}" action_app="${user_config.action_app}" alerter_timeout="${user_config.alerter_timeout}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/notify.sh" --title 'Claude compact' --message 'Context trimmed' --sound 'Glass' --context_aware false
